\documentclass{siddur}

% Custom page numbering to yield 159.a, 159.b, etc.
\renewcommand{\thepage}{159.\alph{page}}

% --- MACRO DEFINITIONS ---
\newcommand{\blockA}{%
  SING THE SONG of men and women \\
joined in understanding and respect. \\
The song of God's miracles, \\
an earth protected and cherished; \\
a gift for our children \\
and the generations to come. \\
The song of a land once ravished by war, \\
now quiet and content; \\
her soldiers home, to leave no more. \\
The song of a world redeemed: \\
the song of peace.%
}

\newcommand{\blockB}{%
  Salvation is the Jews' victory over human limitations: ignorance or insensitivity. It is the conquest \\
of sinfulness, of the evils resident within the self: pride, selfishness, hate, lust, cynicism, the \\
deliberate rejection of goodness and truth. Milton Steinberg%
}

% --- DOCUMENT BODY ---
\begin{document}
\blockA
\vspace{1em}
